description: Recto (secondary use): Court record written and signed by Natan b. Shelomo ha-Kohen (1125–50). Wherein it is stipulated that a husband who travels to the Rif is required to stay home for two weeks and is not permitted to absent himself for more than a month, during which he has to pay his wife her expenses every week. If he fails to do so, he has to deliver to her the final marriage gift immediately and in full (that is, divorce her). She promises to fulfill her duties in order to avoid divorce. The right side of the document is broken off and it is impossible to determine the extent of the document lost. (Information from Mediterranean Society, III, p. 190)
description_he: פרוטוקול בית משפט שנכתב ונחתם על ידי נתן ב' שלמה הכהן (1125-50). נקבע שבעל הנוסע לרי"ף חייב לשהות בבית שבועיים ואינו רשאי להיעדר יותר מחודש, ובמשך היעדרותו חייב לשלם לאשתו את הוצאותיה מדי שבוע.
